subcodes.first_line: Praise be to the omnipotent Sovereign, Who is worthy and befitting, Whose bounty hath encompassed all who dwell upon the earth from among the peoples [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد سلطان مقتدری را لایق و سزاست که نعمتش را بر جمیع من علی الارض از احزاب
subcodes.subjects: @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
